textByHash.0a94493e61e0c9c2845320ecfc65075365defaaa: Well it's just a board with some notes on it. I'm sure you could figure something out.
textByHash.1703d1dbaab31e5206615e09b8c3b6c4fe57117c: Sorry . That scroll is for you, not me.
textByHash.18fbb0d34519bfacdbe9a36871f3b3be67d59cca: I am Watson, the master of clue scrolls. I have lived a long life here in Kourend. The lands are beautiful here.
textByHash.1d2e4a902027b0ee72991a3ac6650b737fa8b421: No, but I could write down the instructions to make one. Then all you'd need is a house with a study to build it in, and a bolt of cloth.
textByHash.1e2c81e8057a1ab766cfded39fef90513487d326: I have seen many, but few are good enough. I only give out my clue scrolls to the very best.
textByHash.275034b19bb43b33876760252f17457528f5836c: You'll find that information written on the statistics board by the door.
textByHash.309f0dfae1f17892b4b5a7030b5c84ea88e210da: I will remember which ones you have given me though. I expect you'll find that useful.
textByHash.34bf377c70ec563ba5654670db94e209d96a4a2a: Not so fast . I require payment. You must bring me a clue scroll of all lower tiers.
textByHash.4f16d309f69d7d0df23d41a4bf43ca0b28a0e990: If you want to help deal with the strange casket I have upstairs, I think it also has some scroll cases as well.
textByHash.5c1a2f1481b963cb682d09f9ab57aafde826c36f: You can get scroll cases by completing clues. You can get up to two extra scroll cases for each clue tier by doing that kind of clue.
textByHash.66660a7cc347338d309596a054d32bf7e1db7a35: I have a master scroll box for you, but you already have too many of them! Finish them or discard them, I don't care which.
textByHash.6ee5e26a462063d9fbb40ec7fad14b552907fcd7: That is for you to find out.
textByHash.7588dcb26b655cf779b1252db277c621baa45bd4: Ha! It is not so much due to my ego, but the fact that I give out master tier clue scrolls.
textByHash.77a29fc05a4c126343398ca89a8c1c1f0bc37868: I can give you the exact numbers, but I wouldn't worry too much about them. You'll get them eventually.
textByHash.7990b7774f1233a57489f68bab85f832a894d7b7: Master clue scrolls are the most challenging of all clue scrolls. They will test you in ways you have not been tested before.
textByHash.92819c7a3379e9e12f74a810dc329f7359671fa7: I'm not giving it away for free, 500 coins is just covering my expenses!
textByHash.a058e402edcad51f299e9629939e68e91a8bf4ce: Well, the long and short of it is that scroll boxes contain clue scrolls, but in a much easier to carry form factor.
textByHash.b4598d7323078a0e398e9ff38edaaffb18061fdc: Nice work , I've had one of each lower tier clue scroll from you.
textByHash.b70e763c1b2ca8b09a5c045c51bd3e3693d65350: You need to bring me clue scroll you haven't already given me .
textByHash.b92a6a6158449477323a070360ac561063ae046f: You don't have enough space for it.
textByHash.bb224795e780fed833d9ff26b191304bc5587252: As I said, I've never heard of him. If he was such a big deal, I would have heard of him...
textByHash.bd4a4ddd83f27401abdcfd714915f2d677a298ab: Alright, feel free to carry on using mine.
textByHash.c0f3f71bb23e91dae2f7a7569b3617781e574a81: It lets you view any of your S.T.A.S.H units that you have built around Gielinor.
textByHash.c96f683932995b19a966388e390b2345ba140ea8: Sure is windy today, did you hear that?
textByHash.cbe192b69e51922eb258554bc41fab0142809db3: You will be led all over Gielinor with your strengths, your weaknesses, your mental strength and your reactions all scrutinised.
textByHash.d93228dcea595feacfbcdfcb8278fff097235d1f: Do you want to trade that in? You'd need another copy to take your scrolls out again. But I'll swap it for some teleport scrolls if you like, so you can travel here more easily.
textByHash.dec882e07e5833a50d4a0b1b9c47180da124b89e: Come again if you change your mind.
textByHash.e905da62545d6fc73e3a49263ee28c64f956f1a2: Now, just because they're easier to carry, it doesn't mean you can take as many as you want. You'll need scroll cases to be able to store them.
textByHash.f638f2282f44db8ab8892d2fc6ae8d22892124bd: Never heard of the bloke. I haven't a clue who he is.
